title: citronella ilicifolia
intro: Citronella ilicifolia, also known as the lemon-scented pepper tree, is a plant species native to Australia and Southeast Asia, characterized by its distinctive, peppery aroma. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. These properties are said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Citronella ilicifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
